allow:
Bash(git -c user.name="Maknistong68" -c user.email="Maknistong68@users.noreply.github.com" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Lovella date-ask app

React + Vite + Tailwind single-page app with a playful runaway NO button,
heart confetti on YES, and resilient response storage \(Supabase with
localStorage backup + retry queue\). Hardened for in-app browsers
\(TikTok/Messenger/IG\) via a bounded play-area for the NO button.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -c user.name="Maknistong68" -c user.email="Maknistong68@users.noreply.github.com" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Make copy all-Tagalog, gentler, and mobile-safe

- All on-screen text now in Tagalog \("kahit minsan", "walang pressure"\)
- Replace 6-dodge chase with 2 gentle hops so the NO button stays
  visible and tappable on phones / in-app browsers
- Add soft, no-guilt second-chance flow when NO is tapped
- Kind, pressure-free ending for a real "no"
- Update page title / link-preview text to Tagalog

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -c user.name="Maknistong68" -c user.email="Maknistong68@users.noreply.github.com" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Use a single smaller photo and tighten button layout

- Replace 4-photo grid with one compact centered portrait \(public/photos/her.jpg\)
- Move Oo and Hindi closer together in a smaller play area

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -c user.name="Maknistong68" -c user.email="Maknistong68@users.noreply.github.com" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Rename photo to her.png and point the app at it

- Rename uploaded screenshot to a web-safe filename \(no spaces\)
- Update photo path and og:image to /photos/her.png

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
